title: ranunculus flabellatus var. robustus
intro: Ranunculus flabellatus var. robustus, also known as the robust yellow water-crowfoot, is a rare and lesser-known plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus flabellatus var. robustus include its possible use in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as an infusion or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
